Clean, fast portfolio site optimized for GitHub Pages.

This version removes legacy 3D content and focuses on what your class needs: clear sections, readable project summaries, and a CV block you can update in minutes.

About Me

I'm a Mechanical Engineering student at Concordia University. I build practical systems at the intersection of hardware, software, and performance engineering.

Projects

Dual Clutch Paddle System

ESP32 + C++ wireless paddle shifter system for Formula wheel control.

Accumulator + Harness Packaging

Electrical architecture, thermal-aware enclosure layout, and integration planning.

Hydrogel Research Support

Experimental setup, confocal analysis, and iteration on formulation outcomes.

Experience

GLV Harness and Enclosures Lead · Concordia Formula Racing

Jan 2025 – Present · Montreal, Quebec

Leads low-voltage architecture and harness implementation with accumulator and PCB integration support.

Research Assistant · McGill Craniofacial Tissue Engineering Lab

Jun 2024 – Present · Montreal, Quebec

Supports hydrogel test workflows and imaging-driven analysis for material behavior.
